lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What was the name of the woman David saw from his roof?
What sin did David commit with Bathsheba?
What happened that revealed David’s sin?
What message did David send to Joab?
answers: Put Uriah in heavy fighting and leave him alone
Tell Uriah that I have sinned

questions.text: What happened to Uriah in the battle?
What did Bathsheba do after her husband died?
answers: She mourned, then married David and had a son

questions.text: What story did Nathan tell David?
answers: A rich man stole a poor man’s beloved lamb
A shepherd searched for a sheep
A price was turned into a frog

questions.text: How did Nathan’s story relate to David?
answers: David was like the rich man who stole the lamb
David was like the poor man who lost his lamb
David was like the lamb who was stolen
The story had nothing to do with David

questions.text: What did Nathan tell David after he confessed?
answers: God forgave his sin, but the child would sadly die
God would make him king forever
Urian would be the new king
